description: Port rich system prompt architecture from JS Copilot CLI to Python CLI — identity, guidelines, code change rules, memory injection, context compaction, custom instructions, and mode-specific messages.

userStories.title: Core system prompt builder with all static sections
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH CLI, I want the AI to receive a rich, structured system prompt with identity, task guidelines, code change instructions, linting/testing rules, style rules, ecosystem tools, tips, and prohibited actions sections — matching the quality of the original JS Copilot CLI.

userStories.title: Environment context and custom instructions
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH CLI, I want the system prompt to include structured environment context (OS, git repo, available tools) and support reading custom instructions from `.github/copilot-instructions.md` so the AI understands my project conventions.

userStories.title: Memory system prompt injection
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH CLI, I want stored memories from previous sessions to be injected into the system prompt with guidance on how the AI should use, verify, and refresh them.

userStories.title: Context compaction and summarization
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH CLI, I want the conversation history to be automatically compacted when the context window fills up, replacing old messages with an AI-generated summary so the session can continue without losing important context.

userStories.title: Autopilot mode context injection and utility messages
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH CLI, I want the correct mode-specific context message injected when transitioning between interactive and autopilot modes, and I want utility messages (quota insufficient, task not complete) available as prompt templates.
